'''pafazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyack|kyack]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-f-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyack|kyack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pafazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæfæzhæth|pæfæzhæth]] || [[word:pæfæzhæj|pæfæzhæj]] || [[word:pæfæzhæsh|pæfæzhæsh]] || [[word:pæfæzhæ|pæfæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pafafazhath|pafafazhath]] || [[word:pafafazhaj|pafafazhaj]] || [[word:pafafazhash|pafafazhash]] || [[word:pafafazha|pafafazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pafazhath|pafazhath]] || [[word:pafazhaj|pafazhaj]] || [[word:pafazhash|pafazhash]] || [[word:pafazha|pafazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pafafzhath|pafafzhath]] || [[word:pafafzhaj|pafafzhaj]] || [[word:pafafzhash|pafafzhash]] || [[word:pafafzhaf|pafafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pafazhatha|pafazhatha]] || [[word:pafazhaja|pafazhaja]] || [[word:pafazhasha|pafazhasha]] || [[word:pafazhaka|pafazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pafazhath|pafazhath]] || [[word:pafazhaj|pafazhaj]] || [[word:pafazhash|pafazhash]] || [[word:pafazha|pafazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pafazhathal|pafazhathal]] || [[word:pafazhajal|pafazhajal]] || [[word:pafazhashal|pafazhashal]] || [[word:pafazhakal|pafazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pafazhathatha|pafazhathatha]] || [[word:pafazhajaja|pafazhajaja]] || [[word:pafazhashasha|pafazhashasha]] || [[word:pafazhaka|pafazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pafazhathan|pafazhathan]] || [[word:pafazhajan|pafazhajan]] || [[word:pafazhashan|pafazhashan]] || [[word:pafazhakan|pafazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pafazhathaoro|pafazhathaoro]] || [[word:pafazhajaoro|pafazhajaoro]] || [[word:pafazhashaoro|pafazhashaoro]] || [[word:pafazhakaoro|pafazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
